---
title: "leo_contribution-statement"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Leonardo Stefanidi — Contribution Statement

**Primarily responsible for:** planning, analysis and visualisation of research question 2

- examined important variables and made plots for proposal
- Co-authored the research questions section
- data preparation, functions, analysis and visualization for research question 2
- main part: line 102 -340 in RKI-Skript

**Collaborative tasks:** group reflection
